home.hero.title: FireTools
home.hero.description: Your collection of free online tools for file conversion, document processing and more. Fast, secure and easy to use.
home.feature.pdf.title: PDF Splitter
home.feature.pdf.desc: Split your PDFs into individual pages quickly and securely.
home.feature.url.title: URL Shortener
home.feature.url.desc: Create short and personalized links for your long URLs.
home.feature.image.title: Image Converter
home.feature.image.desc: Convert images between different formats with high quality.
home.feature.video.title: Video Converter
home.feature.video.desc: Convert videos to MP4, AVI, MKV and other formats.
home.feature.audio.title: Audio Converter
home.feature.audio.desc: Convert audio files between MP3, WAV, FLAC and other formats.
home.feature.background.title: Background Remover
home.feature.background.desc: Remove the background from your images automatically using AI.
home.about.title: Why choose FireTools?
home.about.content: FireTools brings together a set of utilities we use daily in real projects. Each tool goes through automated tests and follows security best practices to ensure your files are processed reliably.
home.about.item1: Direct and responsive interface, optimized for desktop and mobile devices.
home.about.item2: Processing executed on scalable servers with 24/7 monitoring.
home.about.item3: Temporary files automatically deleted after the configured retention period.
home.about.item4: Transparent reports on supported formats, size limits and average times.
home.cases.title: Use cases we solve
home.cases.content: Our tools are designed for marketing teams, legal departments, designers and content creators who need to save time on repetitive tasks.
home.cases.doc.title: Corporate documentation
home.cases.doc.desc: Split extensive contracts into smaller attachments or convert PDFs to Word to speed up reviews.
home.cases.design.title: Design and ecommerce
home.cases.design.desc: Automatically remove backgrounds to create catalogs and convert images to formats required by marketplaces.
home.cases.marketing.title: Digital campaigns
home.cases.marketing.desc: Use the URL shortener with click reports and adapt videos or audio for different platforms.
home.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
home.faq.a1: No. Files are automatically deleted after {hours} hour(s) and we do not use your data to train models.
home.faq.a2: Yes. We maintain the service through ads and optional corporate subscriptions, without limiting essential features.
home.faq.q3: Can I use the resources on my team?
home.faq.a3: Of course. Many teams integrate FireTools into their workflow by sharing conversion reports and shortened links.
audio.result.file_ready: Your file is ready for secure download below.
audio.result.file_subtitle: Download the converted audio. Available for up to 1 hour.
audio.result.tips.title: Tips for using the file
audio.result.tips.intro: With the download in hand, consider these best practices to maintain quality:
audio.result.tips.1: Review the volume and normalize the audio before publishing it on streaming platforms.
audio.result.tips.2: Keep the original file in case you need to reconvert to another format in the future.
audio.result.tips.3: Use metadata (ID3 tags) to organize libraries in players and podcasts.
audio.result.next_steps.title: Suggested next steps
audio.result.next_steps.intro: Share with your team or export again using another FireTools tool:
audio.result.next_steps.1: Convert the track to video by adding a cover or waveform in your preferred editor.
audio.result.next_steps.2: Integrate the audio into presentations or learning materials with synchronized captions.
audio.result.next_steps.3: Store the file in secure clouds and set up alerts to delete old versions.
video.result.file_ready: Download the converted file using the link below.
video.result.file_subtitle: Save the converted video. It will remain available for up to 1 hour.
video.result.checklist.title: Publication checklist
video.result.checklist.intro: Before sending the file to external platforms, perform a quick review:
video.result.checklist.1: Watch the first few seconds and verify that audio and video are synchronized.
video.result.checklist.2: Confirm that the generated format is within the guidelines of the service where it will be published.
video.result.checklist.3: Optimize the filename with keywords that facilitate later organization.
video.result.suggestions.title: Usage suggestions
video.result.suggestions.intro: Processed videos can be used in multiple scenarios:
video.result.suggestions.1: Create short versions for social media using the converted file as a base.
video.result.suggestions.2: Incorporate subtitles or alternative audio tracks for accessibility.
video.result.suggestions.3: Distribute internally in training and store in a secure repository.
image.result.ready: Download the conversions or start a new processing.
image.result.files_subtitle: Click on each item to download the converted file.
image.result.tips.title: How to make use of conversions
image.result.tips.intro: Take advantage to apply images to different channels without losing quality:
image.result.tips.1: Use light formats (WEBP/AVIF) on web pages to speed up loading.
image.result.tips.2: Prefer PNG when you need transparency in banners or mockups.
image.result.tips.3: Optimize filenames with descriptions that help with SEO and internal search.
image.result.practices.title: Recommended practices
image.result.practices.intro: Ensure visual consistency in your campaigns with these considerations:
image.result.practices.1: Keep an original copy in high resolution for future edits.
image.result.practices.2: Standardize dimensions before publishing on marketplaces or social networks.
image.result.practices.3: Create an internal guide with ideal formats for each communication channel.
background.result.ready: Download the transparent image using the link below.
background.result.file_subtitle: Download the version with background removed. The file will be automatically deleted in 1 hour.
background.result.where_use.title: Where to use the cropped image
background.result.where_use.intro: Images with transparent backgrounds are ideal for various visual contexts:
background.result.where_use.1: Creating banners and posts with creative overlays in design software.
background.result.where_use.2: Product catalogs in ecommerce, highlighting items without distractions.
background.result.where_use.3: Corporate presentations with custom backgrounds without losing contrast.
background.result.final_adjustments.intr: Before publishing, consider these steps to refine the result:
background.result.final_adjustments.1: Refine edges in software like Photoshop or Photopea by applying light smoothing.
background.result.final_adjustments.2: Export versions in different resolutions when you need thumbnails and hero images.
background.result.final_adjustments.3: Organize an internal bank of approved images to facilitate team reuse.
pdf_divisor.result.description: Your PDF has been split into quadrants and is ready for download. Each original page has been transformed into 4 smaller pages.
pdf_divisor.result.processed.title: Processed File
pdf_divisor.result.processed.text: Click the button below to download your split PDF
pdf_divisor.result.info.title: What happened to your PDF?
pdf_divisor.result.info.quadrants.title: Quadrant Division
pdf_divisor.result.info.quadrants.desc: Each page was divided into 4 equal sections using intelligent algorithms
pdf_divisor.result.info.pages.title: Multiplied Pages
pdf_divisor.result.info.pages.desc: Your PDF now has 4x more pages than the original, maintaining all information
pdf_divisor.result.info.quality.title: Preserved Quality
pdf_divisor.result.info.quality.desc: Resolution and quality were maintained in each processed quadrant
pdf_divisor.result.next_steps.title: Suggested next steps
pdf_divisor.result.next_steps.intro: After confirming the download, organize the material to facilitate your team's work:
pdf_divisor.result.next_steps.1: Rename pages in batches to reflect chapters, annexes or specific sections.
pdf_divisor.result.next_steps.2: Share the split PDF in electronic signature tools when you need to collect approvals.
pdf_divisor.result.next_steps.3: Combine desired quadrants in editing software if you want to create custom compositions.
pdfconvert.result.use_files.title: How to make use of generated files
pdfconvert.result.use_files.intro: Organize the output according to your team's needs:
pdfconvert.result.use_files.1: Combine specific pages into a single editable document using editors like Word or Google Docs.
pdfconvert.result.use_files.2: Send the resulting images to visual review tools and collect team comments.
pdfconvert.result.use_files.3: Store files in shared directories with standardized naming convention.
pdfconvert.result.security.title: Security best practices
pdfconvert.result.security.intro: Protect the original document information after conversion:
pdfconvert.result.security.1: Delete downloaded files when they are no longer needed to prevent leaks.
pdfconvert.result.security.2: Enable password protection on final versions or use digital signatures when applicable.
pdfconvert.result.security.3: Review metadata before sharing externally, removing sensitive information.

url.result.tips.trust.title: Use trusted links
url.result.tips.trust.desc: Verify the original destination whenever sharing the link in public places.
url.result.tips.integration.title: Simple integration
url.result.tips.integration.desc: Use the copy button to paste the link in emails, social networks or QR Codes.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
terms.section1.content: By accessing or using FireTools tools, you agree to comply with these Terms of Use and all applicable laws. If you do not agree with any condition, do not use our services.
terms.section2.title: 2. Service description
terms.section2.content: FireTools provides online tools for file conversion, image processing, PDF manipulation and URL shortening. Services are provided "as is", without warranties of continuous availability.
terms.section3.title: 3. Permitted use
terms.section3.1: Do not use the tools for illegal purposes or that violate third-party rights;
terms.section3.2: Do not submit content protected by copyright without authorization;
terms.section3.3: Do not compromise application security through automated scripts or reverse engineering;
terms.section3.4: Do not use the tools for distribution of malware, spam or abusive content.
terms.section4.title: 4. Limitation of liability
terms.section4.content: FireTools does not guarantee that services will be uninterrupted or error-free. We are not responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use the tools, including data loss or lost profits.
terms.section5.title: 5. Intellectual property
terms.section5.content: The source code, layout and FireTools brand are property of the development team. Uploaded files remain the property of the user. It is forbidden to copy, redistribute or create derivative works without express authorization.
terms.section6.title: 6. Service modifications
terms.section6.content: We may change, suspend or discontinue any tool at any time, with or without prior notice. We may also update these Terms at any time; changes take effect after publication on this page.
terms.section7.title: 7. Applicable law
terms.section7.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, without prejudice to the application of other applicable data protection legislation.
terms.section8.title: 8. Contact
terms.section8.content: Questions about these Terms should be sent to
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.section1.content: FireTools values user privacy and is committed to protecting information collected during the use of our online tools. This Privacy Policy describes how we handle personal data, what information is collected and what rights you have.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Data collected
privacy.section2.essential.desc: used to maintain sessions, preferences and protection against attacks (CSRF).
privacy.section2.ad.desc: Google AdSense may set its own and third-party cookies to personalize ads.
privacy.section2.navigation.desc: IP address, user agent and pages accessed are recorded in logs for audit and security.
privacy.section2.files.desc: files uploaded for processing are temporarily stored for up to {hours} hour(s).
privacy.section2.files.item: Uploaded files: files uploaded for processing are temporarily stored for up to {hours} hour(s).
privacy.section3.title: 3. Use of information
privacy.section3.intro: We use the collected information to:
privacy.section3.1: Execute and improve conversion and processing tools;
privacy.section3.2: Ensure application security and prevent abuse;
privacy.section3.3: Display advertising and measure ad performance (Google AdSense);
privacy.section3.4: Comply with legal obligations and respond to requests from competent authorities.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Sharing with third parties
privacy.section4.intro: We do not share personal data with third parties, except:
privacy.section4.1: With Google, for ad serving through AdSense;
privacy.section4.2: When required by law or court order;
privacy.section4.3: With infrastructure providers used to host the service.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Retention and deletion
privacy.section5.content: Uploaded files are automatically deleted after processing and, at most, within {hours} hour(s). Access records and security logs are kept for the period necessary for audit and compliance with legal obligations.
privacy.section6.title: 6. User rights
privacy.section6.3: Request deletion of records, when applicable;
privacy.section6.4: Revoke consent for use of optional cookies.
privacy.section6.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at email
privacy.section7.title: 7. Security
privacy.section7.content: We employ technical and administrative measures to protect collected data, including connection encryption (HTTPS), access monitoring and periodic deletion of temporary files.
privacy.section8.title: 8. Updates to this policy
privacy.section8.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We recommend checking this page frequently to verify any changes. The date of the last update is indicated at the beginning of the document.
privacy.section9.title: 9. Contact
privacy.section9.content: Questions about this policy can be sent to
